primary_text:
Two supply chains feed Sydney families. One takes weeks and thousands of kilometres. The other takes days.

FarmThru: farm to hub. Days, not weeks. The farmer keeps more. You know their name.

It's a simpler model and it produces better food. But scaling it takes people who believe it should exist.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: Two supply chains. One is broken
description: Help build the shorter one. FarmThru equity crowdfunding on Birchal, mid-2026. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Two-frame animation. Frame 1: long chain with 5 steps, grey tones. Frame 2: short 2-step chain, green and warm. Simple, visual, immediate.
